name: Smart Dock Menus
description:
Adds app-aware quick-access menus to your dock icons — no opening the app first.

• VS Code → jump into a recent project or workspace
• Files → open a recently used file
• Spotify → see what's playing and control playback (play/pause, next, previous)
• Settings → jump directly to Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Sound, Displays, Power, and more

Built on open standards: MPRIS for Spotify, XDG recent files for Files, VS Code's own SQLite history, and gnome-control-center panels for Settings. Works with Dash-to-Dock and Ubuntu Dock.
